================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Custom Backdrop Banner Stands for Trade Shows & Event Displays ## Professional Backdrop Banner Stand Material & Event Display Solutions PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: 9 oz stretch fabric Product: with Backdrop Slider Stand Hardware Size (H x W): Available in 8' x 8' and 8' x 10' configurations Display Options: Single or double-sided printing available Hardware Included: Complete backdrop slider stand system PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fabric Backdrop Banner Options for Professional Event Displays

Professional backdrop banner stands provide the perfect portable display solution for trade shows, conferences, photo shoots, and stage presentations. Our adjustable slider frame system accommodates banners from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height, creating stunning vertical displays for any event.

Each backdrop banner stand features high-quality 9 oz stretch fabric material with pole pockets sewn on top and bottom for secure mounting. The telescopic pole construction allows multiple graphic sizes to be displayed on the same frame system.

Complete Backdrop Banner Stand Package

  • (1) Single Sided Custom Graphic Print
  • (2) 4.5" Pole Pockets (Top and Bottom)
  • (1) Large Slider Frame System
  • (1) Black Nylon Carry Bag
  • 1 Year Warranty on Graphic and Frame

Professional Display Specifications

  • Display Size: 96"W x 96"H maximum
  • Graphic Size: 96"W x 94"H
  • Shipping Dimensions: 41" x 5" x 4"
  • Weight: 16 lbs total system
  • Frame Color: Professional black finish

Optional upgrade: Add 2 additional side pole pockets for enhanced graphic tension and professional appearance at trade shows and events.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Material Options for Durable Trade Show Displays

Our backdrop banner stands feature premium 9 oz stretch fabric material specifically engineered for professional event displays and trade show applications.

9 oz Stretch Fabric Benefits

  • Superior Durability: Heavy-duty fabric withstands repeated setup and breakdown cycles
  • Stretch Retention: Advanced stretch fibers maintain shape after movement and storage
  • Professional Appearance: Smooth, wrinkle-resistant surface for crisp graphic presentation
  • Dye-Sublimation Compatible: Accepts vibrant, long-lasting color reproduction
  • Easy Care: Machine washable for maintaining professional appearance

The stretch fabric material ensures your backdrop banner maintains a professional, taut appearance throughout extended trade show installations and event displays.

Fabric Construction Details

  • 9 oz weight provides optimal balance of portability and durability
  • Reinforced pole pocket construction for secure frame mounting
  • Fade-resistant material suitable for indoor and outdoor event use
  • Compatible with all backdrop slider stand hardware systems
PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Finishing Options for Backdrop Banner Stands

All backdrop banner stands include professional finishing details designed for trade show and event display applications.

Standard Finishing Features

  • Top & Bottom Pole Pockets: 4.5" reinforced pole pockets sewn on top and bottom edges
  • Precision Hemming: Clean, professional edges that won't fray during repeated use
  • Dye-Sublimation Printing: Vibrant colors that won't crack, peel, or fade
  • Edge-to-Edge Coverage: Full bleed printing for maximum visual impact

Available Upgrade Options

  • Side Pole Pockets: Add 2 additional pole pockets on left and right sides for enhanced tension
  • Double-Sided Printing: Maximize visibility with graphics on both sides of the backdrop
  • Custom Sizing: Special dimensions available for unique display requirements

Side pole pocket upgrades provide additional graphic stability and create a more professional appearance for high-visibility trade show installations.

Professional Display Features

  • Wrinkle-resistant fabric maintains smooth appearance
  • Color-matched pole pocket fabric for seamless integration
  • Reinforced stress points for extended trade show use
  • Professional black carry bag included for easy transport

Backdrop Banner Stand Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production scheduling to meet your trade show and event deadlines, with production times ranging from 5 to 7 business days.

5 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular turnaround option - fast enough for most custom backdrop banner orders with no additional rush charges.

  • Perfect for planned trade shows and scheduled events
  • Includes complete backdrop banner stand system
  • Professional quality control and inspection included
  • Free standard production timeline

7 Business Days Saver Production

Cost-effective option for backdrop banner stands when you have additional lead time available.

  • Reduced pricing for extended production timeline
  • Same professional quality and materials
  • Ideal for advance event planning
  • Significant cost savings on backdrop banner orders

Production Schedule Details

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Production begins after artwork approval and file upload completion
  • Rush options available for urgent trade show deadlines
  • Turnaround includes production time plus shipping transit

Emergency same-day rush production may be available for urgent trade show requirements. Contact customer service for immediate assistance with tight event deadlines.

Payment & Ordering Options for Custom Backdrop Banner Stands

Secure payment processing for all backdrop banner stand orders, with multiple convenient payment methods available.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Corporate and business checks accepted
  • Purchase Orders: Available for qualified business accounts

Payment Processing Details

  • Payment required before backdrop banner production begins
  • Credit cards charged only after final order approval
  • Check payments must clear before production starts
  • Secure SSL encryption protects all payment information

For check payments, backdrop banner stand orders enter production after check receipt and clearance. This typically adds 3-5 business days to the total order timeline.

Business Account Benefits

  • Net payment terms available for qualified accounts
  • Bulk pricing for multiple backdrop banner stand orders
  • Priority customer service for trade show deadlines
  • Custom invoicing for corporate accounting requirements

Shipping Guidelines for Backdrop Banner Stand Delivery

Professional shipping services ensure your backdrop banner stand arrives safely and on time for your trade show or event.

Standard Shipping Information

  • Default Method: UPS Ground service to most destinations
  • Coverage Area: 1-3 day ground delivery to 90% of United States
  • Tracking: Complete tracking number provided at shipment
  • Packaging: Professional packaging designed for backdrop banner stands

Available Shipping Options

  • Standard Ground: 3-5 business days to most locations
  • Three Day Select: Guaranteed 3 business day delivery
  • Two Day Express: 2 business day delivery for urgent orders
  • Next Day Air: Overnight delivery for trade show deadlines
  • UPS AM Service: Morning delivery for critical events

Shipping Guidelines

  • Backdrop banner stands ship in compact 41" x 5" x 4" packaging
  • Total shipping weight approximately 16 lbs
  • Large orders may require additional shipping charges
  • Residential delivery available with standard surcharges

For trade show delivery timing questions, contact customer service at (320) 965-9300 before placing your backdrop banner stand order.

Production Facilities

Backdrop banner stands are produced at our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, selected based on your location and optimal delivery timeline.

Trade Show & Event Uses for Professional Backdrop Banner Stands

Versatile backdrop banner stands provide professional display solutions for numerous business and event applications.

Trade Show Applications

  • Booth Backdrops: Create impressive backwall displays at trade shows and conventions
  • Product Showcases: Highlight products and services with branded backdrop displays
  • Company Branding: Reinforce brand identity with professional backdrop banner graphics
  • Portable Displays: Easy setup and breakdown for multiple show schedule

Corporate Event Uses

  • Conference Presentations: Professional speaker backdrops for corporate events
  • Award Ceremonies: Step-and-repeat style backdrops for photo opportunities
  • Product Launches: Branded backdrops for new product introduction events
  • Company Meetings: Professional presentation backdrops for internal events

Photo & Video Applications

  • Photo Shoots: Clean, professional backgrounds for portrait photography
  • Video Production: Branded backdrops for corporate video content
  • Live Streaming: Professional backgrounds for virtual events and broadcasts
  • Interview Settings: Neutral or branded backdrops for media interviews

Special Event Displays

  • Wedding receptions and ceremonies
  • Graduation celebrations
  • Sports team events and banquets
  • Fundraising events and galas
  • Grand opening celebrations

The adjustable frame system accommodates various graphic sizes, making backdrop banner stands perfect for different venues and display requirements.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Custom Backdrop Banner Stand Printing

Professional artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality for your backdrop banner stand graphics.

Preferred File Formats

  • Vector Files: .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) with fonts converted to outlines
  • High Resolution: .pdf or .jpg files at 300 DPI or higher
  • Large Format: Files sized to actual backdrop banner dimensions
  • Color Mode: CMYK color mode for accurate print reproduction

Design Templates Available

  • 8' x 8' backdrop banner templates (EPS and PDF formats)
  • 8' x 10' backdrop banner templates (EPS and PDF formats)
  • Pole pocket placement guides included
  • Safe area guidelines for critical text and graphics

Artwork Specifications

  • Resolution: Minimum 150 DPI at full size, 300 DPI preferred
  • Bleed Area: Include 0.5" bleed on all sides
  • Safe Zone: Keep critical elements 2" from pole pocket areas
  • File Size: Maximum 60 MB for online upload

For files larger than 60 MB, contact customer service for alternative file transfer instructions to ensure fastest processing of your backdrop banner order.

Professional Design Services

  • Custom backdrop banner design available
  • Logo integration and brand matching
  • Professional graphic design consultation
  • Proof approval process for quality assurance

Color Matching Services

For color-critical backdrop banner applications, we recommend our Color Match Proof System to ensure accurate color reproduction for corporate branding and trade show displays.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What is a backdrop banner stand?

A backdrop banner stand is a portable and adjustable frame designed to hold and display large fabric or vinyl banners. It provides a sturdy structure to showcase banners in a vertical orientation, creating a visually appealing backdrop for various events, trade shows, conferences, photo shoots, or stage presentations.

What materials can my artwork be printed on?

Your backdrop banner stand graphics are printed on premium 9 oz stretch fabric material. This high-quality fabric provides excellent durability, vibrant color reproduction, and maintains a professional appearance through repeated use at trade shows and events.

Can I swap banners in the backdrop banner stand?

Yes, backdrop banner stands are designed to allow for easy swapping of banners. Simply remove the existing banner from the pole pockets and replace it with a new one. This versatility allows you to use the same backdrop stand hardware for different events or update your promotional messages and graphics as needed.

Do you offer different sizes for the backdrop banner stand?

Yes, we offer backdrop banner stands in two standard sizes: 8' x 8' and 8' x 10'. The adjustable slider frame can accommodate displays ranging from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height, providing flexibility for different venue requirements.

Can I order the Backdrop Banner Stand hardware separately?

Yes, you can order backdrop banner stand hardware separately. If you already have graphics but need the stand hardware, or if you require a replacement stand, ordering the hardware separately provides a convenient and cost-effective solution for your display needs.
